app.name: Twinzy
app.subtitle: Upload a photo and get a fun style/vibe result based on visible traits.
app.description: A free, playful game. No face recognition, no identity matching, and your photo is never stored.
app.footerNote: Twinzy is a free game for entertainment only.

home.step2: We read visible traits like hair, eyes, and face shape.
home.step3: You get playful public style/vibe matches. That is all.
home.privacyNotice: We do not store your photo. It is only used to extract visible traits for this game.

game.title: Your vibe check
game.processingText: Reading visible traits and preparing your vibe result...
game.processingHint: This usually takes a few seconds. Please keep this tab open.

upload.consentLabel: I understand this is only a fun style/vibe game and my photo is not stored.
upload.label: Upload a photo
upload.hint: JPG, PNG, or WebP. Max 5 MB. One photo only.

result.title: Your vibe matches
result.disclaimer: This is a playful style/vibe result based on written visible traits only. It is not face recognition, identity matching, or biometric comparison.
result.shareTemplate: I tried this fun vibe game and got: {name} with {score}% style/vibe fit.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.intro: Twinzy is built to know as little about you as possible.
privacy.photoNotStored: Your photo is never stored. It is processed only to read visible traits, then destroyed.
privacy.traitsOnly: The game only works with written descriptions like hair color or face shape.
privacy.noFaceRecognition: There is no face recognition, no identity matching, and no biometric comparison of any kind.
privacy.noTemplates: We never create or keep face templates, embeddings, or any biometric data.
privacy.geminiNote: Our server uses the Google Gemini API to read visible traits and suggest playful matches.
privacy.funOnly: Results are for fun only and can be wrong.
privacy.freeNote: The game is completely free, so we never ask for payment details.

terms.title: Terms
terms.noSeriousUse: Do not use results for identity checks, hiring, dating decisions, or anything serious.
terms.permission: Only upload photos of yourself, or of someone who gave you clear permission.
terms.mayBeWrong: Results are playful guesses based on written traits. They can be wrong.
terms.noHarassment: Do not use results to harass, shame, or judge anyone.

help.title: Help
help.a1: You upload one photo. We read visible traits like hair and face shape as text, then suggest public figures with a similar overall style/vibe. The photo itself is deleted right away.
help.a2: No. The matching works only on written trait descriptions, never on your actual face data.
help.a3: No. It lives in memory just long enough to read the visible traits, then it is destroyed.
help.a4: Nothing. The game is completely free.
help.q5: Why did I get no match?
help.a5: Sometimes the traits are too generic or unclear for a confident playful match. Try a clearer, well-lit photo.

errors.fileTooLarge: That photo is too big. Please pick one under 5 MB.
errors.fileTypeNotAllowed: Please use a JPG, PNG, or WebP photo.
errors.consentRequired: Please tick the consent box before playing.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.network: We could not reach the game server. Check your connection and try again.
errors.rateLimited: Too many tries in a short time. Please wait a moment.
errors.aiUnavailable: The vibe engine is unavailable right now. Please try again in a moment.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: We could not find the page you were looking for.

errorPage.title: Something went wrong
errorPage.description: An unexpected error interrupted the game. Please try again.
